description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the registry.gitlab.com/schpaper/alpine-jekyll:master Docker image and defines two stages: test and deploy. In the test stage add a test job that runs "chmod +x script/*", "./script/setup.sh" and "./script/build.sh", stores the "_site" directory as an artifact that expires after 1 day, and runs on all branches except master. In the deploy stage add a pages job that runs "chmod +x script/*", "./script/setup.sh" and "./script/cirelease.sh", sets the variable JEKYLL_ENV=production, publishes the "public" directory as a pages artifact, configures the environment named gitlab-pages with URL https://schpaper.gitlab.io, and only runs on the master branch.
